value.stringValue: There is some error while creating Billing Platform event. Reach out to System Administrator for more information.
There is some error while creating Billing Record. Reach out to System Administrator for more information.
There is some error while creating Billing Platform event. Reach out to System Administrator for more information.
Invalid Request to Handle Voucher Billing - Invalid Context Value
Invalid Request to Handle Voucher Billing - Invalid Context Value
There is an error while getting the Standard Pricebook record.
Get Matching PriceBook Entry process has failed.
Get Order Item Detail process has failed.
Get VD Records process has failed.
There is some error while creating Billing Record for Order Products. Reach out to System Administrator for more information.
There is some error while creating Billing Platform event for Order Products. Reach out to System Administrator for more information.
Invalid Request to Handle Voucher Billing - Order and Voucher present.
Invalid Request to Handle Voucher Billing - Order and Voucher present.
Invalid Request to Handle Voucher Billing - No Context Provided
Invalid Request to Handle Voucher Billing - No Context Provided

decisions.name: Billing_Event_Record_List_Empty_Check
decisions.label: Billing Event Record List Empty Check

Flow.description: Voucher Billing Handler is an auto launched flow which will invoke either from Voucher Order controller apex or Voucher after save flow and it will take Context, Voucher or OrderProducts as an input parameter.
Flow.label: LOY - Voucher Billing Handler

variables.description: Unique Id to associate the billing event to the billing record
variables.name: var_FlowGUID
